top.title: US says it struck Iranian radar sites as Kuwait reports missile and drone attacks
top.summary: Iran and the US say they have carried out fresh strikes around the Strait of Hormuz, with Kuwait condemning "repeated" Iranian attacks.

top.title: Iran attacks damage 20 US military sites since start of war, satellite images show
top.summary: Analysts told BBC Verify that Tehran's strikes were more extensive than publicly acknowledged.

top.title: Israel PM orders strikes on Beirut suburbs as Hezbollah conflict escalates
top.summary: Benjamin Netanyahu says the Hezbollah stronghold of Dahieh will be targeted in response to attacks on Israeli civilians.

top.title: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
top.summary: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.

top.title: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
top.summary: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.

top.title: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
top.summary: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.

title.#text: These are the first Nvidia RTX Spark laptops
Asus just announced the OLED Xbox Ally X of my dreams
This is the Microsoft Surface Laptop Ultra with Nvidia RTX Spark
